div.head: The Ambassador in Japan (Warren) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 62. Your 32, April 8, 6 p.m. MatsudairaTsuneo Matsudaira, Secretary General of the Japanese delegation at the Washington Conference. called upon his return; spoke of this matter and said that after considering with UchidaCount Yasuya Uchida, Japanese Minister of Foreign Affairs. he desired to take the matter up with me. Have since expressed to Uchida and Matsudaira my willingness to take the matter up whenever they are ready but Uchida has been occupied with the Diet and now is occupied with Privy Council so they have sought no opportunity to take question up.
